arts.sum: Bayern could be looking to add further talent to their ranks this summer.

arts.ttl: Barcelona & Real Madrid on alert as Bayern Munich withdraw contract offer
arts.sum: Spanish football’s leading clubs have on Thursday been put on alert. This comes owing to developments behind the scenes at Bundesliga heavyweights Bayern Munich. As per a report from German…

arts.ttl: Stick or twist: Thomas Muller's future at Bayern is uncertain
arts.sum: The 35-year-old club legend's future is up in the air according to BILD and Der Spiegel.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich exploring potential Joshua Kimmich replacements
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that Bayern Munich are already exploring the market for potential Joshua Kimmich alternatives, with the midfielder’s contract expiring in the summer. Earlier today it was revealed that Bayern…

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal, Liverpool, Manchester City, Real Madrid, FC Barcelona ready to pounce on Bayern Munich’s contract spat with Joshua Kimmich
arts.sum: Arsenal FC, Liverpool FC, and Manchester City — all clubs linked to Kimmich in recent months — are reportedly very interested in acquiring the versatile midfielder on a free transfer this summer: According to a report from the Daily Express, several clubs could be looking to get involved in the suddenly open sweepstakes for Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich.

arts.ttl: Major Joshua Kimmich update from Bayern Munich puts Liverpool and Man City on red alert
arts.sum: Germany and Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich could become one of the most in-demand free agents in world football this summer if contract talks are not revived

arts.ttl: From Munich minnows to European giants - Bayern Munich celebrate 125th anniversary
arts.sum: On 27 February 1900, a group of football enthusiasts led by Franz John decided to break away from their local gymnastics club and form their own football team. They probably had no idea they were...

arts.ttl: Before things fell apart, Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich was expected to make his decision on contract
arts.sum: During Monday's supervisory board meeting, it was agreed not to improve the club's current offer to Joshua Kimmich anymore. The extensions of important figures for the present and future has been a priority at the club.

arts.ttl: Sebastian Hoeneß only interested in moving to a club that has qualfied for the Champions League if he wishes to leave VfB Stuttgart
arts.sum: kicker reports that VfB Stuttgart head coach Sebastian Hoeneß will only move to a club that has qualified for the Champions League, if he decides to leave the MHP Arena in…

arts.ttl: BFW Question of the Day — February 27th: Should Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany rest banged up players on Friday?
arts.sum: So many key players are banged up and there is so much risk with the Champions League match against Bayer Leverkusen on Wednesday. Bayern Munich is not exactly strolling into this weekend’s Bundesliga match with VfB Stuttgart at full health.
